# ⚠️ Deprecated - See ability_compilation_bytecode

This skill has been **consolidated** into a unified framework.

**New Location**: `.agent/skills/ability_compilation_bytecode/SKILL.md`

All content from this skill including:
- Semantic audit pipeline
- Semantic testing methodology (triangulation)

- Guidelines & standards

**Reason**: These three skills were tightly coupled and covering overlapping domains. Consolidation prevents confusion and ensures consistent practices across:
- Pseudocode writing

**Action**: Update any references to use `.agent/skills/ability_compilation_bytecode/` instead.
